## Compat matrix

- [ ] Reviewed any drift in `tests/golden/compat-matrix.md` or
  `tests/golden/baseline-static-id.md`. Re-blessed intentionally when the
  drift is expected (e.g. flpdf writer change, qpdf upgrade, new fixture).
- [ ] Added a corresponding entry to `docs/qpdf-compat-decisions.md` if
  this PR introduces a new deliberate divergence from qpdf.

If both baselines are unchanged and no new `needs-review` subtasks are
introduced, both boxes can be ticked without action.
